description: Customer purchase orders. One row per order_id. order_status reflects fulfillment lifecycle (delivered, canceled, shipped, ...).

columns.customer_id: Customer placing the order — FK to customers
columns.order_status: Lifecycle state: delivered | canceled | shipped | invoiced | processing | unavailable | created | approved
columns.order_purchase_timestamp: Timestamp when the customer completed checkout
columns.order_delivered_timestamp: Timestamp when the order reached the customer (NULL if not delivered)
